columns.extraction_plan: The control arm is explicitly stated in the abstract and methods section. On page 1, in the "METHODS" section of the abstract, it states: "Patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer were randomly assigned to darolutamide or placebo plus androgen-deprivation therapy and docetaxel." On page 2, in the "Trial Design" section under "METHODS", it states: "Enrolled patients were randomly assigned (1:1) to oral darolutamide 600 mg twice daily or matched placebo, in combination with ADT and docetaxel."
